title: Program will not open.
author: zactill
body_snippet:
Love the program, rely on it honestly. For whatever reason I continually have the confCons.xml issue where it goes to null and the program will not open. I copy a confCons.xml backup for my connections and uninstall the program. I reinstall and import my connections and it works fine for the day. When I come back the next day the program will not open and I have to do this process all over again, every day.

## Current Behavior
Program will not open, confCons.xml goes null.

## Possible Sol...

iterations.description: confCons.xml corruption causing startup failure is a known class of issues, but the reporter provides no logs, no error details, and no reproducible steps; we already posted a triage-refresh comment asking for confirmation on the latest build with no response.

comments.author: nmat
comments.snippet: After you have imported and you save the config after...with or without making a change does that work?

comments.author: GeriZ
comments.snippet:
I have the same problem. Under certain circumstances confCons.xml will be destroyed and I must restore this file too. But reinstalling of mRemoteNG is not necessary in my case

Version: 1.77.1.27654

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (claude): confCons.xml corruption causing startup failure is a known class of issues, but the reporter provides no logs, no error details, and no reproducible steps; we already posted a triage-refresh comment asking for confirmation on the latest build with no response.
Approach: Wait for reporter to retest on latest build and provide logs/steps; close as stale if no response within 30 days.
